issues_found: Source body is truncated; the document ends mid-sentence during the 'Staff Review of the Economic Situation' section, cutting off after stating PCE inflation was 2.8 percent in January. Critical sections missing include the Committee's policy decision and vote, participants' views on the economic outlook, economic projections, dissents, policy guidance, and risk assessments.
The record was generated from incomplete source content. While the captured sections appear accurate, the full Committee deliberations and policy decision are not available for verification.
human_review_reason: Source truncation raises concern about whether the record captures the most critical elements of the FOMC minutes (the policy decision, vote tally, and forward guidance). The captured content is accurate and detailed for what it covers, but human review is needed to determine if the complete minutes should be obtained for comprehensive archival value. The risk is that significant policy signals from the latter portions of the minutes may not be reflected.
